governingBody: Wisconsin corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Wisconsin prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: Features.
note: The Wisconsin prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: Features Nudity. DOC 309.04(4)c.8.a.
